title: Δd Charge Angle 3: Stochastic & Path Integral Asymmetry

rough_path_lifting.new_finding: Path→signature: Δd=1 in stochastics (Hölder path = EML-2 → iterated integral = EML-3)
rough_path_lifting.chen_chow: Signature determines path up to reparametrization: EML-0 (binary fact)
rough_path_lifting.note: Rough paths: first Δd=1 in stochastics. Radon's Δd=1 analog for path integrals.

signature_analysis.note: Signature levels: 0,0,2,3,3,... — log-signature = EML-2 (more structured than full signature)

rough_paths.key_insight: Rough paths: path→signature Δd=1 (new!); full signature=EML-3; log-signature=EML-2

doob_maximal.note: Doob maximal: EML-2 (L²) or EML-1 (sub-Gaussian); decomposition = EML-2

optional_sampling.asymmetry: τ=EML-∞; E[M_τ]=EML-0: optional sampling collapses depth

martingale_depth.key_insight: Doob: bounds=EML-1/2; optional sampling EML-∞→EML-0 (depth collapse)

feynman_kac.note: FK is a depth-reduction map (EML-∞→3), same as RG flow (∞→1) and AdS/CFT (∞→2)

path_integral_modes.note: Path integral modes: saddle=EML-1; one-loop=EML-2; semiclass=EML-3; full=EML-∞

path_integral_asymmetry.key_insight: FK = EML-∞→3 depth reduction; modes ladder: saddle→1-loop→semiclass=1→2→3

eml_depth_summary.EML-0: Wald identity, gambler's ruin, path reparametrization class
eml_depth_summary.EML-1: Azuma-Hoeffding bound, classical action exp(-S), Doob sub-Gaussian
eml_depth_summary.EML-2: Hölder path regularity, Doob-Meyer decomposition, log-signature, one-loop det
eml_depth_summary.EML-3: Signature/iterated integrals, heat kernel, semiclassical path
eml_depth_summary.EML-\u221e: Full path integral, stopping time, exact quantum path

key_theorem: The EML Stochastic Asymmetry Deep Theorem (S194): Rough paths theory reveals a NEW Δd=1 instance: Hölder path (EML-2 regularity) → rough path signature (EML-3 iterated integrals): Δd=+1. This is the stochastic analog of the Radon transform (S192): a depth-lifting operator with Δd=1, distinct from the Fourier-type Δd=2. The signature determines the path up to reparametrization (Chen-Chow): EML-0 fact. Recovering exact path from signature: EML-∞. Δd=∞. Feynman-Kac is NOT an inversion but a DEPTH REDUCTION: EML-∞ → EML-3 (same class as RG flow ∞→1, AdS/CFT ∞→2). Path integral modes form the ladder: saddle (EML-1) → one-loop (EML-2) → semiclassical (EML-3) → full quantum (EML-∞).
rabbit_hole_log: Rough path → signature: Δd=1 (new stochastic Δd=1)! Hölder=EML-2, signature=EML-3
Log-signature = EML-2: more structured than full signature (EML-3) — compression
Optional sampling: EML-∞ stopping time → EML-0 result: depth collapse, not inversion
FK = depth reduction EML-∞→3: same class as RG, AdS/CFT — all three are depth-reducing maps
Path integral modes: 1→2→3→∞ ladder going UP (toward more quantum)
Azuma=EML-1: sub-Gaussian concentration is the stochastic universal EML-1

connections.S191_breakthrough: Rough paths Δd=1 confirms Radon-type class; EML-2→3 not EML-1→3
connections.S192_transforms: Radon Δd=1 (averaging) parallels rough path Δd=1 (path lifting)
connections.S185_rg: FK depth reduction ∞→3 joins RG(∞→1) and AdS/CFT(∞→2) as depth-reduction catalog
